channel.title: φιλοσοφία · The Philosophy Café
channel.description: Agora of the mind — where thoughts breathe & wisdom awakens. Daily philosophical debates, polls, thought seeds, and curated resources.

item.title: Daily Debate: Fear of Death
item.description: Should we fear death? Epicurus says no — where death is, I am not. The mortalist says yes — fear of death makes us value life. Vote and join the debate.

item.title: Weekly Poll: Free Will
item.description: Is free will an illusion? Cast your vote in this week's philosophical poll.

item.title: The Philosophy Café — New Features
item.description: Site-wide search now available (Ctrl+K or /). Browse past debates & votes archive. Improved security with Supabase Auth. New sitemap and RSS feed for syndication.
